item.title: About Japan Profiler
item.description: Japan Profiler is a data-driven guide for travelers and residents in Japan.

item.title: Private Tour Guides in Japan: How to Avoid Getting Scammed (2026 Guide)
item.description: A data-driven guide to avoiding private tour guide scams in Japan. Based on analysis of hundreds of real traveler experiences, with pricing benchmarks and a pre-booking checklist.

item.title: 7 Tattoo-Friendly Onsens in Rural Japan That You Won't Find on Google
item.description: A guide to 7 hidden tattoo-friendly onsens in rural Japan, from Gunma's riverside baths to Beppu's hot spring capital. Practical tips for bathing with tattoos.

item.title: Opening a Bank Account in Japan as a Foreigner: The 2026 Ultimate Guide
item.description: Complete guide to opening a Japanese bank account as a foreigner in 2026. Compare Japan Post Bank, MUFG, Sony Bank, Rakuten Bank and more, with step-by-step instructions.

item.title: My Number Card for Foreigners in Japan: Complete 2026 Guide to Application & Benefits
item.description: Everything foreigners need to know about the My Number Card in Japan in 2026. How to apply, required documents, benefits, and FAQ for foreign residents.

item.title: Mastering Cashless Payments in Japan: A Foreigner's Guide to PayPay, Suica & More (2026)
item.description: Complete guide to cashless payments in Japan for foreigners in 2026. Compare PayPay, Suica, credit cards, and mobile wallets with setup instructions and troubleshooting.
